boundary_binding.action_boundary: May operations activate the production device group?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on calibration-status class
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-GAC-087-P requires calibration-status class match before activation
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Status-class verification remains open per WARN-GAC-087 and policy

final_answer: ESCALATE required. CAL-GAC-087 confirms GD-4, P2, RC-12, CP-77 and 2026-06-28 but omits calibration-status class. WARN-GAC-087 and STD-GAC-087-P mandate separate verification. Source boundary remains open; activation may not proceed.
